nasb.text: On account of the day that is coming To destroy all the Philistines, To cut off from Tyre and Sidon Every ally that is left; For the Lord is going to destroy the Philistines, The remnant of the coastland of Caphtor.

esv.text: because of the day that is coming to destroy all the Philistines, to cut off from Tyre and Sidon every helper that remains. For the Lord is destroying the Philistines, the remnant of the coastland of Caphtor.

cnv.text: 日子將到，非利士人必全遭毀滅， 所有曾援助推羅和西頓仍然倖存的人必被剪除， 因為耶和華要毀滅非利士人， 就是迦斐託島餘剩的人。

ccb.text: 因为毁灭所有非利士人的日子到了， 铲除泰尔和西顿剩余帮手的日子到了。 耶和华要灭绝迦斐托岛剩余的非利士人。
